__comment__: Reflection-hook wiring for .claude/settings.json. MERGE the `hooks` block below into your existing settings.json (don't overwrite the whole file). Adjust the paths to where you copied this `hooks/` directory. See README.md.
__how_to_wire__: 1. Copy the whole hooks/ directory into your .claude/ (e.g. .claude/hooks/reflection/).
2. Merge the `hooks` block below into .claude/settings.json, fixing the `command` paths.

3. The Stop hook drives the ON_TURN_END facets (failure->control). The PostToolUse hook is OPTIONAL and only needed for the memory-routing facet; wire it plus a sibling memory-write emitter, and set REFLECTION_MEMORY_DIRS to your private-memory store(s).
4. Kill switches (set in `env` below or your shell): REFLECTION_TURN_END_OFF=1 disables the whole family; each facet has its own, e.g. REFLECTION_FAILURE_CONTROL_OFF=1.
